name: Reggie Watts
blurb: He served as bandleader on The Late Late Show with James Corden throughout its run, and released stand-up specials including Comedy Central's Why Shit So Crazy and Netflix's Spatial.
bio: Reggie Watts is an American comedian, musician, and improviser whose performances are built almost entirely on the spot using his voice, a keyboard, and a loop pedal, blending nonsense, song, and shifting accents. He served as bandleader on The Late Late Show with James Corden throughout its run, and released stand-up specials including Comedy Central's Why Shit So Crazy and Netflix's Spatial. His work sits at the intersection of comedy, music, and disorienting improvisation.

timeline.ev: Born in Stuttgart, then West Germany
Comedy Central special Why Shit So Crazy
Becomes bandleader on The Late Late Show

accolades: Bandleader on The Late Late Show with James Corden (2015-2023)
Acclaimed for a fully improvised vocal-and-loop performance style
